form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation 13th of 16 at Pakenham in the LR Pakenham Cup December 13 over 2500m, 9 len behind Taramansour carrying 57.5kg at $101. When resuming last campaign ran last of 8 at Flemington Qlty Hcp August 2 over 2530m, 3.5 len behind Bold Soul carrying 59.5kg at $8. Certainly has the class on his day, have to include.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. First up last campaign ran last in a small field at Caulfield in the G3 Eclipse November 29 over 1800m, soft track; 12 len behind Casino Seventeen with 56kg at $19. Has the class on his day, keep safe.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation by 2.75 len Ballarat Hdle August 17 over 3600m in the wet defeating Split carrying 72.5kg at $3.20. First up last campaign ran last of 10 at this track Terang Cup April 13 over 2150m, 13 len behind Ziryab carrying 61.5kg at $17. He'll need this one.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 4th of 8 at Flemington Bm84 on February 28 over 1600m, 5 len behind Astral Flame with 60kg at $31. Last start came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Flemington Bm84 on March 28 over 2000m, on rain affected going; 2.75 len behind Zakouma with 60kg at $31. Well placed. Very hard to hold out.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 57-day let-up. First-up after three months ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 12 at Matamata Rating 75 on February 14 over 2000m, on heavy track; 2.75 len behind Titled with 58kg at $41.20. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at Arawa Park on October 12 over 1950m, in the wet; 6 len behind What A Charma carrying 54kg at $23.20. Faces tough test.
